series_metadata.series_title: Third Party Insurance and Accident Recovery Files
series_metadata.series_description: Case files containing legal and claims documentation from Medicaid recipients involved in health insurance and accident (TORT)suits involving another party to recover eligible benefits. Files include case and claim numbers, recipient personal data and medical history, provider and benefit information, copies of benefit warrants, and benefit amounts recouped as result of settlements. Unresolved cases are referred to the Attorney General’s Office for disposition.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: 30 days hard copy is imaged and quality review is complete, and ; Electronic: in office case is closed and 6 years in records center
